name: aiscope agent-mode demo — read Wikipedia article and follow link
description: Demonstrates cli2-only agent mode: a compound goal with multiple distinct phases. The planner decomposes the goal into milestones, then the executor drives the browser turn-by-turn against the plan. Uses Wikipedia so the run is deterministic and free.
goal: Navigate Wikipedia and confirm a multi-phase agent-mode loop completes.

steps.name: Agent: search, open an article, follow one link
steps.description: A goal with three distinct phases. Fast mode tends to either skip straight to the final step or loop on the search. Agent mode opens with a planning call that produces explicit milestones ('use search', 'open top result', 'follow first internal link') and drives the browser against them.

action.goal: Use the Wikipedia search box to look up 'browser automation', open the top search result's article, and then click any internal (in-site) article link from within that article's body to land on a second Wikipedia page.

successCheck.ai: The current URL is on en.wikipedia.org and is a different Wikipedia article than the search results page — i.e. we followed a link from within the first article to a second article.
